---
channel_id: example-channel
zone: example-zone
created: 2026-05-11
schema_version: 1
---

# Channel memory

Persistent context for this channel that gets loaded into every agent turn.
The agent reads this; the agent (eventually) writes to it via the `remember`
tool, on a branch, merged via PR.

## Active work

(Empty for now — populated by the agent as work progresses.)

## House rules

- Always reply in-thread.
- Open PRs against `main`, never push directly.
- Tag the originating teammate on the PR.

## Recent decisions

(Empty — distilled by the nightly memory job from the last 7 days of activity.)
